issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (automatic when DON!! returned to deck), not 'Activated' (manual ability). The effect activates when a game action occurs, not when player chooses.
Missing condition to track '[Once Per Turn]' limit. Should include turn count condition to enforce once-per-turn restriction.
Missing trigger condition for 'DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck'. Current DSL lacks the specific event condition that activates this effect.
Missing duration constraint '[Your Turn]'. Effect text explicitly states '[Your Turn]' which means this only applies during your turn phase, not opponent's turn. Should set duration:'DuringYourTurn'.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Your Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less.
